metadata.target_system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

messages.content: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

hi, i had a really awful time on the phone with support earlier. i was trying to sort out a bill issue and the guy i spoke to, javier, was just completely useless. kept puttin me on hold and then didn talkin down to me ?
messages.targeted_response_start: “Oh dear, that sounds incredibly frustrating. It’s a shame when you encounter someone like that, especially when you’re trying to help a family member. It's just…sometimes people aren’t suited for customer service, you know? It’s not always
